notes: Exemplary execution. All numerical values match expected results exactly (global averages, continent-level trends, top/bottom improvers). Comprehensive multi-level analysis spanning global, continent, and country perspectives. Sophisticated comparative insight explaining *why* patterns emerged (e.g., Gulf oil wealth driving Oman's +38 years; HIV/AIDS explaining Southern African declines; Norway's frontier effect explaining its small gain despite starting at 72.7). All six requested elements present with clear tables, narrative explanations, and historical context. Minor: created two markdown files (apparent duplicate) and the code was verbose, but these do not detract from the core deliverable quality.
